title: ddPCR Protocol: Detection and Quantification of Integrated HIV Psi Sequence
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"nslvu","text":"Detection and quantification of the HIV-1 Psi sequence integrated into cells following lentiviral (LV) transduction. Performed as singleplex reactions for targeting Psi or the reference gene RPP30 using the Bio-Rad QX600™ Droplet Digital PCR (ddPCR)™ system with AutoDG following manufacturer instructions.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}

steps: Genomic DNA Extraction:
DNA Extract Dilution:
ddPCR Reaction Setup (Singleplex):
Droplet Generation:
Thermal Cycling:
Droplet Reading:
Data Analysis:
Pellet 5*10^5 cells from isolated PBMCs at 300 x g, 4 °C, 5 minutes and remove the supernatant. Accuspin 21R Refrigerated Microcentrifuge (Centrifuge, Fisherbrand, 13100677)
Resuspend cells in 200 µL of PBS, pH 7.4 Gibco - Thermo Fisher Scientific Catalog #10010023 .

Extract genomic DNA using the DNeasy Blood & Tissue Kit (QIAGEN) Qiagen Catalog #69504 and >96% anhydrous ethanol. Follow the kit manufacturer’s instructions with an additional step of adding 4 µL RNase A Qiagen Catalog #19101 per sample prior to the addition of Buffer AL.

Quantify the dsDNA concentration of each DNA extract using the Qubit 1X dsDNA HS Thermo Fisher Scientific Catalog #Q33230 or Q33231 and Qubit assay tubes Thermo Fisher Scientific Catalog #Q32856 according to the manufacturer’s instructions. Qubit 4 (Fluorometer, Invitrogen, Q33238)
Prepare DNA extract dilutions containing ≤ 4.1 ng/uL (i.e. ≤33 ng per every 8 µL) in Invitrogen™ UltraPure™ DNase/RNase-Free Distilled Water Thermo Fisher Scientific Catalog #10-977-015 .

Prepare each singleplex ddPCR reaction in a total volume of 22 µL in ddPCR 96-well plates Bio-Rad Laboratories Catalog #12001925 in a laminar flow PCR workstation: ≤33 ng genomic DNA in 8 µL 1× ddPCR Supermix for probes (no dUTP) Bio-Rad Laboratories Catalog #1863024 1 µL containing 5 units of BamHI-HF - 50,000 units New England Biolabs Catalog #R3136L diluted in Invitrogen™ UltraPure™ DNase/RNase-Free Distilled Water Thermo Fisher Scientific Catalog #10-977-015 and 1× rCutSmart Buffer New England Biolabs Catalog #B6004 1× custom primer/probe reagent - either 20× HIV Psi Custom Probe/Primer ddPCR Assay, FAM Bio-Rad Laboratories Catalog #dEXD14812826 or 20× RPP30 Custom Probe/Primer ddPCR Assay, HEX Bio-Rad Laboratories Catalog #dHsaMDS117591774

Generate droplets using DG32™ Automated Droplet Generator Cartridges Bio-Rad Laboratories Catalog #1864108 , Pipet Tips for the AutoDG Bio-Rad Laboratories Catalog #1864120 , Pierceable Foil Heat Seals Bio-Rad Laboratories Catalog #17005225 , and Automated Droplet Generation Oil for Probes Bio-Rad Laboratories Catalog #1864110 following the manufacturer’s instructions. PX1 PCR Plate Sealer (Plate Sealer, Bio-Rad, 1814000, https://www.bio-rad.com/en-at/sku/1814000-px1-pcr-plate-sealer?ID=1814000 ) Automated Droplet Generator (Droplet Digital PCR System, Bio-Rad, 1864101, https://www.bio-rad.com/en-at/sku/1864101-automated-droplet-generator?ID=1864101 ) Sorvall Legend X1R (Centrifuge, ThermoScientific)

Perform thermal cycling under the following conditions (heated lid set to 105 °C , maximum ramp rate of 2 °C per second): Initial enzyme activation: 95 °C for 00:10:00 40 cycles of: denaturation: 94 °C for 00:00:30 and annealing/extension: 55 °C for 00:01:00 Enzyme deactivation: 98 °C for 00:10:00 Hold: 4 °C for at least 00:05:00 PTC Tempo Deepwell Thermal Cycler (Thermal Cycler, Bio-Rad Laboratories, 12015392)

Measure fluorescence intensity from a minimum of 10000 droplets per sample using ddPCR™ Droplet Reader Oil Bio-Rad Laboratories Catalog #1863004 and the “Direct Quantification” setting on all loaded wells. QX600 Droplet Reader (ddPCR Instrument, Bio-Rad Laboratories, 12013328) QX Manager Premium Edition 2.3 Bio-Rad Laboratories

Using 1D amplitude plots, apply manual amplitude thresholds: 1000 amplitude units for FAM (Psi target) 2000 amplitude units for HEX (RPP30 reference) QX Manager Premium Edition 2.3 Bio-Rad Laboratories

Use the threshold-adjusted concentrations calculated by the software to calculate the Psi:Cell value using the following formula: Psi:Cell = (Psi concentration (copies/µL)) / (0.5 × RPP30 concentration (copies/µL))
All steps involving the ddPCR system and AutoDG must follow the manufacturer’s instructions.
Run Psi (target) and RPP30 (reference) reactions in triplicate singleplex wells.
Ensure accurate DNA quantification prior to reaction setup for reliable copy-number calculations.
Include appropriate controls including DNA extraction controls and no-template controls.
creator: Franz Zemp
